message:
test(ratelimit): add unit tests for wait time parsing and rate limit detection

Add comprehensive tests for the ratelimit package's parsing utilities:

ParseWaitSeconds tests:
- Retry-After header format ("Retry-After: 15")
- Natural language seconds ("try again in 3s", "wait 5 seconds")
- Minutes conversion ("retry in 2m" → 120)
- Cooldown suffix ("10 seconds cooldown")
- No match case (returns 0)

DetectRateLimit tests:
- Exit code detection (process exited with code 429)
- Output text detection with Retry-After extraction
- Non-rate-limited output (returns false)

Validates the Source field matches expected detection method
(detectionSourceExitCode vs detectionSourceOutput) and WaitSeconds
is correctly extracted when present.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
